title: bromus cristatus
intro: Bromus cristatus, also known as Crested Brome or Mountain Brome, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bromus cristatus include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Bromus cristatus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used as a dried herb or in capsule form.
